#52603) pitching the construction of biophilic wellness resorts—integrating cantilevered saunas, EMF-shielded sleep sanctuaries, biophilic architecture, and organic custom cabins. ## Prompt 2: High-Ticket Wellness Affiliate Funnel & High-End Men's Longevity Coaching
> **Feed this into Gemini Pro Extended with Deep Research active:**
> *"Activate Deep Research. Develop an autonomous monetization framework for a high-performance wellness and biohacking brand (Keystone Recomposition) targeting affluent Gen-X men. The focus is muscle preservation, metabolic health, peptide case studies (YMYL compliant), and lifestyle architecture. Design: (1) The optimal conversion funnel to transition free YouTube subscribers into a $297/month private Skool community or a $5,000/year high-ticket biophilic coaching cohort, (2) Identify the top 10 highest-paying, vetted affiliate networks and suppliers for metabolic research compounds, physiological monitoring devices (Oura, CGM, Whoop), and EMF-shielding materials, and (3) Provide a complete 30-day automated email sequencing template utilizing AIDA copywriting architecture to convert prospects silently."*

## Prompt 4: DaVinci Resolve & Suno Automated Workflows for Cash-Flow Channels
> **Feed this into Gemini Pro Extended with Deep Research active:**
> *"Activate Deep Research. Analyze the complete Python programmatic scripting options for DaVinci Resolve 18.6 and the Suno AI API to build a fully automated YouTube video factory. I want to build a cash-flow content pipeline that matches AI-generated high-retention cinematic voiceovers with programmatic Deep House background music (124 BPM, motivating, soulful female vocals) and dynamic timber-framing visual overlays. Provide: (1) The complete Python-Resolve API timeline setup code to automatically import audio tracks, apply a warm gold LUT, and split B-roll clips based on sound peaks, and (2) The exact pipeline to deliver finalized wav assets to TooLost Distribution for Spotify/Apple royalties, ensuring zero copyright claims."*
